name: Tom Lehrer
abstract: Thomas Andrew Lehrer ( ; April 9, 1928 – July 26, 2025) was an American musician. He recorded pithy, humorous, and often political songs that became popular in the 1950s and 1960s.

about_quotes.speaker: Ellis Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: There was people like Tom Lehrer and – what’s this guy’s name? He was really funny too.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ellis Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
